name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of hands-on experience in analytical chemistry, method development, and materials characterization. Deep expertise in FT-IR, HPLC, GC-MS, UV-Vis, and thermal analysis (TGA, DSC) with proven ability to develop and validate analytical methods. Postdoctoral work focuses on biopolymer process development with extensive multi-technique analytical characterization, DOE-driven optimization, and data integrity standards. Strong background in cGMP-compliant laboratory practices and regulatory documentation.

education.details: Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

experience.role: Postdoctoral Researcher — Biopolymer Nanoparticle Process Development
bullets: Lead analytical characterization of biopolymer nanoparticles using FT-IR, UV-Vis, DLS, TGA/DSC, and chromatography (GPC/SEC, HPLC), developing robust analytical methods for routine quality assessment.
Design and execute experiments following DOE principles to optimize formulation process parameters, ensuring reproducible product quality and analytical reproducibility.
Develop and maintain SOPs for analytical methods, ensuring data integrity and compliance with best practices in laboratory documentation.
Apply multivariate analysis to correlate process conditions with material properties, driving data-informed decisions for method optimization.

experience.role: Graduate Researcher — Materials Chemistry & Analytical Characterization
bullets: Performed comprehensive analytical characterization using FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, NMR, HPLC, GC-MS, SEM, and XRD to elucidate structure-property relationships in novel materials.
Developed and validated analytical methods for quantitative analysis of electrochromic materials, including spectroscopic calibration curves and chromatographic purity assessments.
Operated and maintained multiple analytical instruments (FT-IR, UV-Vis, HPLC, GC-MS, TGA, DSC), performing troubleshooting, calibration, and preventive maintenance.
Authored detailed technical reports and presented findings at national conferences (ACS, MRS), demonstrating strong scientific communication skills.
Conducted thermal analysis (TGA, DSC) and spectroscopic characterization (FT-IR, Raman) of polymer nanocomposites for materials performance optimization.
Developed analytical protocols for systematic comparison of material properties across experimental conditions.

skills.Analytical Instruments: HPLC/UPLC, GC, GC-MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, IC, TGA, DSC, DLS, SEM, XRD, NMR
skills.Software: OriginLab, GraphPad Prism, ChemDraw, Minitab, MATLAB, Python (pandas, scipy)
skills.Regulatory: cGMP awareness, GLP principles, ICH guidelines familiarity, SOP development
skills.Methods: Analytical method development, validation (ICH Q2), transfer, stability studies, DOE
